Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you eating well?[n]{f 1 5 0}Keeping a well-balanced diet nourishes your brain, which in turn can improve your studies! {f 1 3 156}[n]We prepare great food with all our hearts just for you.[n]=========================[n]Remember, a healthy brain stems from healthy food. Wakatsu's got your back![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today, we're serving up our special, limited dish, only for our regulars—a full course seafood set meal, available at a reasonable price![n]{f 1 5 0}We hope you will all try it![n]=========================[n]Remember, a healthy brain stems from healthy food. Wakatsu's got your back![n]{f 1 1}
